iran_nuke.notes: Day 14 evening — FALLING (stable). Nuclear degradation continues: nuclear scientists killed + Isfahan stockpile buried. Fordow enrichment at 60% still active. IAEA access denied. Trump $10M bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei (successor). No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran focused on conventional retaliation (mining Hormuz, ship attacks) rather than nuclear escalation. Holding at 13.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 14 late — RISING into IMMINENT. MAJOR NEW: Iran confirmed mining Strait of Hormuz (NYT/CNN/Reuters). Trump: US will escort ships through Hormuz — but military says 'not ready' (Al Jazeera). KC-135 refueling plane crash in Iraq kills 6 crew (collision, not hostile fire) — total US dead now 19. 3 more ships struck in Persian Gulf (CNBC). Iran warns oil could hit $200. IAF launched new 'extensive' wave of strikes in Tehran. Iran civilian toll: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured (14 days). New signals: hormuz_mining (+8), navy_escort_committed (-7), ship_attacks (+4). Zone: 72→73 = IMMINENT (60+). First tracker to breach imminent threshold.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 14 evening — IMMINENT. 100+ children now confirmed killed in Lebanon strikes (Guardian). Israel destroying bridges, leaflets threatening Gaza-scale devastation. Bloomberg: expanded incursion preparing. Hezbollah vows existential fight. 800K+ displaced. Zone 78 = deep imminent. Holding.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING. Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey (Mar 13). Sirens in Adana near Incirlik Air Base (3:25am local). Turkey formally demanding Tehran clarification. Ankara emphasizing 'Incirlik is Turkish, not US base' (Nordic Monitor) — distancing from US operations while caught between Iran missile threat and NATO obligations. Atlantic Council: this war poses 'greater risks to Ankara than past conflicts.' Holding at 32.

india.notes: India monitoring Hormuz — Indian LPG carrier successfully crossed Strait of Hormuz (The Hindu). 27 Indian-flagged ships still in Persian Gulf. GCC drafting UNSC resolution. Stable deterrent.

russia.notes: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war (Witkoff, CNBC). Trump sanctions waiver benefits Russia. Russia continues arms supply while calling for ceasefire. Putin-Trump diplomacy ongoing. Stable deterrent.

china.notes: Trump-Xi summit planned Mar 31-Apr 2. China rebuilding grip on North Korea (Reuters). Iran war draining US weapons stockpiles = strategic benefit for Beijing. China silent on ME conflict. Largest-ever US Taiwan arms package proposed. China-Japan tensions ongoing. Stable deterrent.

north_korea.notes: China-DPRK engagement increasing. Kim-Xi correspondence. SCMP: Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' DPRK condemned US ME attacks. Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: ISW: continued Russian offensive. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant. Zelensky in France criticizing US sanctions waiver. US postponed settlement talks. Russia earned ~€6bn from energy crisis. Germany's Merz urged Trump to link Iran and Ukraine wars. Stable elevated.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: ESCALATING: Pakistan bombed fuel depot at Kandahar airport (Kam Air) — Taliban reports (Reuters). China mediating but strikes continue. Worst bilateral conflict in years. Overnight strikes in Kabul, Kandahar, Paktia. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. Up from 22→24.

top_signals: Iran confirmed mining Strait of Hormuz — US officials say (NYT/CNN/Reuters). Oil supply stranglehold intensifying.
Trump: US will escort ships through Hormuz — but military says 'not ready' (Al Jazeera). Gap between rhetoric and capability.
KC-135 refueling plane crash in Iraq kills 6 crew — total US dead now 19 (CNN/NPR/NYT). Collision, not hostile fire.
IAF launches new 'extensive' wave of strikes in Tehran — rescue workers pull injured from rubble in southern Tehran (AP/Guardian)
Iran civilian toll: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in 14 days of US-Israel strikes (Iran Health Ministry/Al Jazeera)
3 more ships struck in Persian Gulf — Iran warns oil could hit $200/barrel (CNBC/CBS News)
Trump offers $10M bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei (The Hindu/Reuters)
Pakistan bombs Kandahar airport fuel depot — worst Pak-Afghan conflict in years despite China mediation (Reuters)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NUCLEAR CONTINUES DE-ESCALATION: scientists killed, stockpile buried, no nuclear tests. CONVENTIONAL ESCALATING SHARPLY: Iran mining Hormuz (asymmetric warfare escalation), ship attacks, 19 US dead. Trump escort承诺 vs military 'not ready' = dangerous capability gap. IMMINENT zone breach on Iran conventional = highest tracker status achieved. Global war probability 40→42.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirmed mining Strait of Hormuz — US officials say
latest_news.text: US officials confirm Iran is actively mining the Strait of Hormuz. This represents a major escalation in asymmetric warfare — mining the world's most critical oil chokepoint. 90+ Iranian vessels including 30+ mine-laying ships damaged/destroyed but mining continues.

latest_news.headline: Trump: US will escort ships through Hormuz — military says 'not ready'
latest_news.text: Trump and Treasury Sec. Bessent say US Navy will escort vessels through Hormuz 'as soon as militarily possible.' But Al Jazeera reports military officials say US is 'not ready.' Gap between political promise and operational capability = dangerous. CBS: this explains why warships haven't entered Hormuz despite Trump's claims Iran's navy is decimated.

latest_news.headline: KC-135 refueling plane crash in Iraq kills 6 crew — total US dead now 19
latest_news.text: Two KC-135 refueling aircraft collided over western Iraq. All 6 crew on one plane killed, other landed safely. CENTCOM: not hostile or friendly fire. Brings total US military deaths in Iran conflict to 19. Operational tempo + strain showing.

latest_news.headline: IAF launches new 'extensive' wave of strikes in Tehran
latest_news.text: Israeli Air Force announced 'extensive' new airstrikes in Tehran. Rescue workers pulling severely injured from rubble in southern Tehran (AP photo). Second major Tehran strike wave today (after Quds Day rally strike earlier).

latest_news.headline: Iran civilian toll: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in 14 days
latest_news.text: Iran's Health Ministry reports 1,444 killed and 18,551 injured since Feb 28 US-Israel attacks began. Victims range from 8 months to 88 years old. International outcry growing. UN warns Hormuz closure has 'immense impact' on humanitarian operations.

latest_news.headline: 3 more ships struck in Persian Gulf — Iran warns oil could hit $200
latest_news.text: Three additional ships struck in Persian Gulf waters. Iran warns oil prices could reach $200/barrel. Iran continues sending millions of oil barrels to China through Hormuz even amid war. California gas prices already exceeded $5/gallon.

latest_news.headline: Trump offers $10M bounty on Mojtaba Khamenei
latest_news.text: US offers $10 million reward for information on Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new Supreme Leader reportedly wounded and hiding. Trump urges Iranians to 'rise up against regime' while admitting overthrow is 'a very big hurdle.'

latest_news.headline: Pakistan bombs Kandahar airport fuel depot — worst bilateral conflict in years
latest_news.text: Pakistan bombed fuel depot of private airline Kam Air near Kandahar airport, Taliban reports. Despite China's mediation efforts, strikes continue. Worst Pakistan-Afghan conflict in years. Border fighting ongoing at Spin Boldak/Mohmand.

outlook: IMMINENT — IRAN CONVENTIONAL BREACHES 60 THRESHOLD: Day 14 late brings the most dangerous escalation yet on the conventional track. Iran confirmed actively mining the Strait of Hormuz — the world's most critical oil chokepoint handling ~20% of global supply. Trump promises Navy escorts but military says 'not ready' — a dangerous capability gap. KC-135 crash adds 6 more US dead (total: 19). IAF launched new extensive Tehran strikes. 3 more ships hit in Persian Gulf. Iran threatens $200 oil. 1,444 Iranian civilians killed in 14 days. NUCLEAR: still de-escalating — scientists killed, stockpile buried, no test imminent. PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Pakistan bombs Kandahar airport fuel depot despite China mediation — escalating. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 12H: whether US Navy escort actually materializes or remains empty rhetoric; whether Iran mining triggers shipping insurance collapse; whether Turkey moves toward Article 4 consultation after third intercept; whether Israel opens expanded Lebanon ground incursion; whether Pakistan-Afghanistan escalation draws in additional regional actors.
